applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: Golden masks domain violations for bfloat16: result.masked_fill_(input_tensor_a < 1, float('inf')) when dtype == torch.bfloat16; for other dtypes plain torch.acosh. Valid input domain is x >= 1.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.acosh(input_tensor); constraints: {'input_domain': 'x >= 1 (outputs inf/nan below 1; bfloat16 golden fills inf)', 'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT required'}
